This is a testharness.js-based test.
[PASS] local to local, grandparent navigates: no preflight required.
[PASS] local to local (same-origin), grandparent navigates: no preflight required.
[PASS] public to local, grandparent navigates: failure.
[PASS] public to local, grandparent navigates: success.
Harness: the test ran to completion.
